☋PastWitness🧠 3. CONVERSATIONAL INTERFACE PROMPTS
🔹 AI INPUT FORMAT
🔹 AI SHELL PRIMER FOR NATAL CHAT
🌀 4. EXAMPLE INTERACTIONS WITH NATAL CHAT
🧭 Prompt: Navigating a Decision
"I’m feeling overwhelmed about a big move. Based on my emotional authority and Pluto gate (61.4), what’s the best way to metabolize this uncertainty?"Expected Reply: • Ride emotional wave to neutrality
• Use Pluto 61.4 = hold the mystery, don’t force answers
• Suggested ritual: silence + writing + planetary activation of Neptune (trusting limits)
🎭 Prompt: Creative Direction
"I want to build a mythic OS. What planetary archetypes in my chart should guide the aesthetic and logic architecture?"Expected Reply: • Use Gate 3.5 (mutation from chaos) → foundational OS logic
